title: Briefing on Avengers: Doomsday Search Trends
description: Recent search trends for 'Avengers: Doomsday' highlight news regarding ticket sales, the film's runtime, and plot details involving multiple universes.

sources.title: ‘Avengers: Doomsday’ Tickets to Go On Sale Next Week, Runtime Revealed (Exclusive)
Avengers: Doomsday’s Full Synopsis Sets 3 MCU Universes on a Deadly Collision Course

sections.heading: Ticket Sales and Runtime
paragraphs: According to The Hollywood Reporter, tickets for 'Avengers: Doomsday' are scheduled to go on sale next week. The same report also notes that the film's runtime has been revealed.

sections.heading: Plot Details
paragraphs: Yahoo Entertainment reports that the full synopsis for 'Avengers: Doomsday' sets three MCU universes on a deadly collision course.

sections.heading: Theater Availability
paragraphs: Alamo Drafthouse has listed 'Avengers: Doomsday' on its website, indicating that the film is part of its upcoming show schedule.

sections.heading: Search Data Context
paragraphs: Google Trends data reflects the popularity of search queries in a specific region and time. The current snapshot indicates a search volume lower bound of 1,000 for 'Avengers: Doomsday' in the US.

faq.a: According to The Hollywood Reporter, tickets are set to go on sale next week.

faq.q: What does the new synopsis reveal?
faq.a: Yahoo reports that the synopsis sets three MCU universes on a deadly collision course.

faq.q: Is the film showing at theaters?
faq.a: Alamo Drafthouse has included 'Avengers: Doomsday' in its show listings.
